text:
after check-in, passengers proceed to the tsa security screening area. british airways terminal dfw is equipped with multiple security lanes to ensure a swift process for travelers. the tsa checkpoints at terminal d are designed to manage large volumes of passengers, particularly during peak travel times.
https://terminal-guides.com/british-airways/british-airways-dfw-terminal-dallas-fort-worth-international-airport/
